message:
chore(gitignore): add ephemeral beads file patterns

Add .bv.lock and .br_history/ patterns to .beads/.gitignore to prevent
accidental commits of beads viewer lock files and command history.

These are machine-specific runtime artifacts that should not be tracked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+# Database
+*.db
+*.db-shm
+*.db-wal
+
+# Lock files
+*.lock
+
+# Temporary
+last-touched
+*.tmp
+
+# Local history backups
+.br_history/
+
+# bv (beads viewer) lock file
+.bv.lock

@@ -1,7 +1,37 @@
-legacy_toon/
+# Build artifacts (all target directories)
 target/
+target*/
 
+# IDE
+.idea/
+.vscode/
+*.swp
+*.swo
 
-# Added by cargo
+# OS
+.DS_Store
+Thumbs.db
+
+# Legacy reference code (not part of Rust project)
+/legacy_toon/
+/legacy_spec/
+
+# Coverage reports
+/coverage/
+
+# Local agent/session artifacts
+SESSION_STATUS.md
+a.out
 
+# Temp directories and crash reports
+temp_test*/
+rustc-ice-*.txt
+
+# Large source images (webp versions are committed)
+*.png
+
+# Claude Code temp files
+claude-upgrade-progress.json
+
+# Added by cargo
 /target
